definition: 1 if HH has any plot, any crop row, or any livestock > 0; 0 otherwise.
Number of owned plots reported by HH.
Total area cultivated = area of own self-cropped plots + area of rented/shared-in plots.
Count of owned plots cultivated by HH themselves in wet OR dry season.
Count of owned plots sharecropped OR rented out to others.
Count of owned plots reported fallow in wet OR dry season.
(rented_out + fallow) / owned — disengagement index (0-1).
Share of owned plots self-cropped in BOTH wet and dry seasons — intensity index.
1 if HH sold or gave away any land in past 12 months.
1 if HH bought or received any land in past 12 months.
Rs. received from land sales in past 12 months.
Rs. paid for land bought in past 12 months.
Total Rs. on agricultural inputs (seed + fertiliser + insecticide + equipment hire + hired labour), wet+dry combined.
input_total_12m_rs / cultivated_area_sqm. NA when cultivated area = 0.
1 if HH paid for fertiliser in either season.
1 if HH paid for insecticide in either season.
1 if HH paid to hire equipment in either season.
1 if HH paid for hired labour in either season.
Count of distinct crops grown (wet + dry seasons combined).
1 if HH grew any of: paddy/rice, wheat, maize, millet, barley, beaten rice.
1 if HH grew any of: sugarcane, jute, tobacco, cardamom, tea, oilseeds.
1 if HH grew any vegetables or fruits.
1 if HH sold any portion of any crop.
Total Rs. from crop sales = Σ (sold_qty × price_per_unit) across crops and seasons.
Mean across crops of (sold_qty / harvested_qty). Unit-invariant. NA if no harvest.
1 if HH owns a plough (n_owned > 0).
1 if HH owns any of: tractor, water pump, tubewell, thresher, drip/sprinkler, generator.
Count of distinct modern equipment types owned.
Rs. total value of agricultural equipment owned (label says 'sales' but data pattern indicates stock value).
1 if HH has any livestock (excluding 'None' rows).
